name: test_integration_primary
description:
arrange: build and deploy the charm. Also, deploy a primary charm.
    act: relate both.
    assert: charm is in active status.
descriptionHtml:
arrange: build and deploy the charm. Also, deploy a primary charm.
act: relate both.
assert: charm is in active status.
